summary: Stage/ground matching-improvement slice for src/melee/gr, split from PR #2617 for easier review. The loaded diff and bot report show small code-match gains across multiple GR translation units, including three new matches and fifteen unmatched-item improvements. One reviewer comment flags a gricemt assert-related change as a regression, but gricemt is not present in the changed_files metadata for this slice.

key_files.role: Adjusted grAnime_801C7C1C local declarations and replaced ternary local initialization with explicit if/else assignments for HSD_MatAnim and HSD_ShapeAnimDObj.
evidence_refs: decomp-dev issue comment: grAnime_801C7C1C improved 97.16% to 98.05%

key_files.role: Improved grBigBlue_801E6C60 field accesses and expression staging; bot report also lists grBigBlue_801E8D64 as a new match.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: x8 to x4 field substitutions and left_x/right_x temporaries
decomp-dev issue comment: grBigBlue_801E6C60 improved 95.24% to 97.20%; grBigBlue_801E8D64 new match

key_files.role: Improved grCastle_801CFBD4 by replacing direct callback table indexing with source pointer locals while retaining PAD_STACK.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: cb1_src and cb2_src introduced in grCastle_801CFBD4
decomp-dev issue comment: grCastle_801CFBD4 improved 95.19% to 96.33%

key_files.role: Adjusted declaration order and introduced side local for corneria cannon branch.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCorneria_801DED50 declaration order; grCorneria_801E1348 side local
decomp-dev issue comment: grCorneria_801E1348 improved 97.62% to 99.02%; grCorneria_801DED50 improved 96.49% to 96.50%

key_files.role: Renamed loop locals to row/col in a 5x6 grid traversal and cleaned HSD_ASSERT spacing.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grGreens_80214FA8 row/col nested loops; grGreens_80215358 assert spacing
decomp-dev issue comment: grGreens_80214FA8 improved 99.28% to 99.63%

key_files.role: Reordered GET_JOBJ/GET_GROUND setup and simplified block-status search by testing loop exhaustion instead of a separate boolean.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grInishie1_801FAC58 declaration/order change; grInishie1_801FB0AC bool match removed
decomp-dev issue comment: grInishie1_801FB0AC improved 97.36% to 98.51%

key_files.role: Set temp_vec to the GroundVars translation field before HSD_JObjGetTranslation.
evidence_refs: decomp-dev issue comment: grInishie2_801FD9EC new match, 99.66% to 100.00%

key_files.role: Adjusted pointer/integer checks, comparison ordering, direct speed-function table indexing, and light-object loop locals in Mute City functions.
evidence_refs: decomp-dev issue comment: grMuteCity_801F1A34 improved 96.67% to 97.30%; grMuteCity_801F290C improved 99.30% to 99.44%

key_files.role: Introduced archive/stage_id temporaries, float literal cleanup, assignment-in-condition shape, and Vec3 pointer reuse for light object position/interest updates.
evidence_refs: decomp-dev issue comment: Ground_801C1E94 new match; Ground_801C466C improved 97.89% to 99.18%

key_files.role: Changed grRCruise_801FFADC in the truncated portion of the diff; bot report shows a match-score improvement.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grrcruise.c excerpt is truncated after start of grRCruise_801FFADC hunk
decomp-dev issue comment: grRCruise_801FFADC improved 98.59% to 99.20%

key_files.role: Changed several Venom functions, but the loaded diff excerpt is truncated before these hunks; bot report lists three unmatched-item improvements.
evidence_refs: decomp-dev issue comment: grVenom_80205AD4, grVenom_80205F30, and grVenom_80206874 listed as improvements

key_files.role: Changed grZebes_801D9798, but the loaded diff excerpt is truncated before this hunk.
evidence_refs: decomp-dev issue comment: grZebes_801D9798 improved 99.24% to 99.92%

key_files.role: Mentioned in PR body and review feedback, but absent from loaded changed_files metadata; reviewer flags an assert-related hunk as a regression.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: PsiLupan comment on grIceMt_801F686C says this is a regression

what_changed: PR was a src/melee/gr directory/subsystem slice split from #2617 for reviewability.
Metadata lists 12 changed files with 119 additions and 118 deletions; PR body also lists gricemt.c, creating a path-list discrepancy with changed_files metadata.
Bot report for this PR slice reports matched code +3188 bytes, 3 new matches, and 15 improvements in unmatched items.
New matches reported: grInishie2_801FD9EC, Ground_801C1E94, and grBigBlue_801E8D64.

Loaded diff shows mostly small code-shape changes: declaration order, explicit temporaries, field selection, pointer casts for integer-stored object handles, loop-local naming, assignment-in-condition, and HSD_ASSERT formatting.
Reviewer feedback flagged a gricemt change as a regression, specifically around an HSD_ASSERT line in grIceMt_801F686C.

smart_moves.title: Split a broad matching branch by subsystem/pathspec for review
smart_moves.text: The PR body says the work was split from #2617 by directory/subsystem so matching improvements are easier to review, scoped to src/melee/gr.

smart_moves.title: Use bot slice report instead of full-branch report as authoritative score
smart_moves.text: The PR body preserves full unsplit source-branch numbers but explicitly says per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting is authoritative for the draft slice once it completes.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting is the authoritative slice score

smart_moves.title: Prefer clear local roles where evidence is direct
smart_moves.text: The diff uses row/col for a 5x6 grid traversal and side for a branch on gp->gv.corneria.x11A, making local roles easier to review without broad symbol renames.

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small source-shape edits can close or improve near-matching GR functions, but each should be tied to narrow bot/build evidence rather than treated as a global style.
evidence_refs: decomp-dev issue comment: 3 new matches and 15 improvements
raw_diff: examples include declaration order, temporary locals, assignment-in-condition, and pointer reuse

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a loop scans for any matching element, comparing the index to the bound after the loop can replace a separate boolean flag and may improve match shape.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grInishie1_801FB0AC removes bool match and checks i == 0x13
decomp-dev issue comment: grInishie1_801FB0AC improved 97.36% to 98.51%

decomp_lessons.lesson: Grid traversal locals can be renamed to semantic row/col when callsites and index math directly establish the roles.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grGreens_80214FA8 changes k/j to row/col and passes col,row to grGreens_80215358

decomp_lessons.lesson: Recovered field selection matters: changing repeated accesses from one unknown offset field to another can be a match-relevant type/field correction, but the PR evidence only proves this specific Big Blue edit, not the semantic meaning of x4 or x8.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grBigBlue_801E6C60 repeated gp->gv.bigblue.data[i].x8 to x4 changes
decomp-dev issue comment: grBigBlue_801E6C60 improved 95.24% to 97.20%

naming_conventions.name: row / col
naming_conventions.meaning: Loop indices for a 5-row by 6-column grid in grGreens_80214FA8.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: for row < 5, for col < 6, index row * 6 + col

naming_conventions.name: side
naming_conventions.meaning: Local copy of gp->gv.corneria.x11A used to choose Corneria cannon placement/lookup branch.

naming_conventions.name: left_x / right_x
naming_conventions.meaning: Temporaries for horizontal range arguments to grBigBlue_801E8B84.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grBigBlue_801E6C60 computes left_x and right_x before grBigBlue_801E8B84

naming_conventions.name: cb1_src / cb2_src
naming_conventions.meaning: Local source pointers for castle callback tables grCs_803B7F28 and grCs_803B7F3C.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCastle_801CFBD4 introduces const unkCastleCallback* cb1_src and const unkCastleCallback2* cb2_src

naming_conventions.name: lobj2 / j
naming_conventions.meaning: Separate light-object iterator and counter in grMuteCity_801F290C, avoiding reuse of earlier lobj/i locals in the shown block.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grMuteCity_801F290C introduces HSD_LObj* lobj2 and s32 j

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Declaration order and widened local lifetime changes
examples: grAnime_801C7C1C moves manim and sdobj declarations to outer scope before explicit assignment.
grCorneria_801DED50 moves grCn_Data* data after pos initialization.
grInishie1_801FAC58 reorders GET_JOBJ and GET_GROUND assignments.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: These are match-shaping tactics; do not promote as general style without narrow objdiff/build evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduce temporaries for reused expressions or argument setup
examples: grBigBlue_801E6C60 uses left_x/right_x before calling grBigBlue_801E8B84.
ground.c uses archive and stage_id before accessing callbacks and archive fields.
ground.c assigns sp10p = &sp10 and passes sp10p to HSD_LObjSetPosition/Interest.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Useful as local codegen shaping, but the PR does not prove a global rule to prefer extra temporaries.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use loop-exhaustion index instead of boolean flag
examples: grInishie1_801FB0AC uses u32 i and tests i == 0x13 after the loop.
evidence_refs: decomp-dev issue comment: function improved by +10 bytes
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Appropriate when the loop bound and break condition are clear.

examples: Ground_801C466C changes separate assignment and NULL check to if ((var_r28_2 = Ground_801C466C_inline()) == NULL).
evidence_refs: decomp-dev issue comment: Ground_801C466C improved 97.89% to 99.18%
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Treat as local MWCC shape tactic rather than readability default.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Retain explicit PAD_STACK only where present in matching source
examples: grCastle_801CFBD4 retains PAD_STACK(12) after removing u8 _pad_top[8].
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: PAD_STACK requires explicit matching evidence and should stay narrow.

review_feedback.author: PsiLupan
review_feedback.comment: As mentioned on another PR, this is a regression.
evidence_refs: review hunk: removal context includes HSD_ASSERT(0x258, i<ICEMT_FIELD_MAX)
review_feedback.status: reviewer flagged regression; exact resolution not shown in loaded evidence

follow_up_queries: PR 2622 gricemt regression HSD_ASSERT ICEMT_FIELD_MAX resolution
grBigBlue_801E6C60 x4 x8 GroundVars field correction
grInishie1_801FB0AC loop exhaustion boolean match removal
Ground_801C466C sp10p Vec3 pointer match tactic
PR 2617 split up GR source branch context

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, merge status, changed file counts
human_pr_text.md: scope, preliminary report, local checks, file list
text_corpus.jsonl: decomp-dev bot report and review comment
raw_diff.diff: truncated loaded diff with detailed hunks for several files
notes: Loaded diff is truncated, so grrcruise is only partially visible and grvenom/grzebes hunks are not visible in the excerpt.
PR body lists src/melee/gr/gricemt.c, and review feedback targets gricemt.c, but changed_files metadata lists 12 files and does not include gricemt.c.
The PR body includes full unsplit source-branch numbers, while the bot issue comment provides the narrower per-PR slice report; the postmortem treats the bot report as the stronger PR-slice evidence.
No loaded evidence shows exact objdiff output, compiler logs, or final resolution of the reviewer-flagged regression.
Several tactics improve scores in this slice but remain local matching tactics rather than accepted global source style.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Loop exhaustion can replace a flag when the bound proves no match
accepted_candidate_records.text: In grInishie1_801FB0AC, the PR removes a separate boolean match flag, uses a u32 loop index, breaks on status == 3, and tests i == 0x13 afterward. The bot report records a score improvement for this function.
evidence_refs: decomp-dev issue comment: grInishie1_801FB0AC improved 97.36% to 98.51%

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use row/col for directly evidenced grid loops
accepted_candidate_records.text: In grGreens_80214FA8, loop variables over a 5x6 array are renamed to row and col, with indexing row * 6 + col and call arguments col,row, directly supporting the local roles.

source_update_candidates.title: Clarify assignment-in-condition as a narrow MWCC matching tactic
source_update_candidates.text: Ground_801C466C improved after changing a separate assignment and null check into if ((var_r28_2 = Ground_801C466C_inline()) == NULL). Consider documenting assignment-in-condition as a permissible local matching tactic only when narrow objdiff/checkdiff evidence supports it, not as general style.
evidence_refs: decomp-dev issue comment: Ground_801C466C improved 97.89% to 99.18%
source_update_candidates.reason: The current standards mention matching tactics generally but do not explicitly call out assignment-in-condition; curator should decide whether this pattern is common enough to document.

source_update_candidates.title: src/melee/gr is stage/ground subsystem matching scope
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2622 scopes a directory/subsystem split to src/melee/gr and the initial classification marks systems stage/ground. Candidate path fact: src/melee/gr contains stage/ground GR matching work.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful for routing future PR intake and decomp searches, but should be curated against existing path facts before promotion.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the full unsplit branch report as the result of this PR slice; the PR body says per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting is authoritative.
Do not infer semantic names for x4, x8, x22_flags, xD0_flags, or other unknown fields beyond the exact field changes shown.
Do not treat pointer/integer casts on car->x24 and car->x28 as preferred style; evidence only shows they were used for this match.
Do not mark gricemt.c as a changed file from changed_files metadata; it is only supported by the PR body file list and reviewer comment in the loaded evidence.
Do not claim reviewer intent or final fix for the gricemt regression; loaded evidence only contains the regression comment.
